overall.description: First-person perspective footage from a video game showing a nighttime walk along a narrow dirt trail through tall grass. The path is illuminated by a flashlight, revealing scattered trees and open fields under a dark sky.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow dirt trail through a grassy field at night. A flashlight illuminates the path ahead, revealing tall grass on both sides and a prominent pine tree silhouetted on the left. The environment is quiet and empty, with only the sounds of footsteps implied.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy nature trail curving through open field

events.description: path curves gently to the right, revealing more trees on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as it curves slightly, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: cluster of trees becoming visible on the right side of the path
open grassy area visible beyond the trail on the left

segments.scene_description: The trail continues and curves gently to the right, causing the large pine tree on the left to recede into the distance. Dense trees become visible on the right side of the path, while the left side opens up to reveal a wider field. The flashlight continues to illuminate the dirt path and surrounding grass as the walk progresses.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a narrow dirt trail that transitions from a confined grassy path into a more open nocturnal landscape. It begins with a flashlight cutting through the darkness to illuminate a dirt path flanked by tall grass and a prominent pine tree silhouetted on the left. As the camera moves forward, the trail curves gently to the right, causing the large pine tree to recede into the distance. The scene then shifts as dense trees emerge on the right side of the path while the left side expands to reveal a wider, open field. The flashlight continues to guide the way, casting a steady beam across the dirt and surrounding vegetation as the journey progresses.
